overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a trench coat exploring a dimly lit industrial warehouse complex at night. The character ascends metal staircases, crosses wooden bridges between brick buildings, and navigates through corridors with atmospheric lighting.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit brick corridor illuminated by a single spotlight, then begins ascending an industrial metal staircase.

segments.scene_description: Entering a new building section, the character walks past metal lockers along a brick corridor and ascends another flight of stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial complex that transitions from narrow brick corridors to a brightly lit interior room. It begins in a dark brick hallway illuminated by a single spotlight, moving upward as the character ascends an industrial metal staircase. As the camera emerges onto an upper walkway, the environment opens up to reveal wooden floors, green ventilation tanks, and large windows before crossing a covered wooden bridge that overlooks a courtyard with fire pits. The scene then shifts back indoors through another brick corridor lined with metal lockers and a second flight of stairs. Finally, the movement concludes as the character enters a well-lit office or lunch room featuring wooden tables, chairs, and a mail cabinet under bright overhead lighting.
